title: Lamb and Tzatziki Wrap
description: A Greek-inspired wrap filled with grilled lamb and a refreshing tzatziki sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Mix lamb with salt and pepper. Grill lamb for 5-6 minutes, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
3. In a bowl, mix together yogurt, cucumber, garlic, and dill.
4. Warm the wraps by wrapping them in foil and heating them in the oven at 350°F (175°C) for 5 minutes.
5. Assemble the wraps by spooning the lamb onto the bottom half of each wrap, followed by a dollop of tzatziki sauce.
6. Top with the top half of the wrap and serve immediately.
7. Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
